name: Analyst: 'Apple will have problems filling' G5 orders; demand 'will not impact Apple's market position'
description: MacDailyNews reprint of a NewsFactor story on the Power Mac G5 launch. Peter Kastner of Aberdeen Group tells Mac buyers they 'should run, not walk' to check out the G5, calling Apple 'arguably a performance leader' with the new PowerPC 970 dual-2GHz machines priced at $1,999 / $2,399 / $2,999. Roger Kay of IDC provides counter-balancing skepticism about G5 impact on Apple's overall desktop market share. Article captures analyst divide on whether supply constraints will matter.

creator.name: Wrolstad (reporter, via NewsFactor/MacDailyNews); Peter Kastner and Roger Kay (quoted sources)
